data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'ETA updates', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions that ETA updates occur automatically in case of traffic delays, there is no specific evidence demonstrating how this functionality is implemented or verified in the system. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to assert that this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API reads provided to confirm the implementation and validation of ETA updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ETA updates functionality.
